# 简体中文
## 📦 整合包说明
本整合包**严格保留原版生存玩法**，**不新增任何物品、道具与原创玩法**。仅加入**性能优化、视觉美化、便捷实用**类模组，原汁原味体验原版MC。
## 📂 内容分类
- 优化模组：提升帧率、减少卡顿、优化内存占用
- 视觉模组：光影支持、材质优化、画面美化
- 实用模组：便捷操作、信息显示、生存辅助
- 资源包 / 光影：均可自由开关搭配
## 📩 联系我们
- 邮箱沟通：**qw_win11@outlook.com**
- Discord 社群：[**Discord**](https://discord.gg/xhJ3Q5zRk5)
- Github 问题反馈区：[**提交 BUG 与建议**](https://github.com/qw-win11/Survival-Mode-Tweaks-issues)
## ⚠️ 注意事项
1. 整合包不破坏原版平衡，纯辅助优化
2. 不兼容OptiFine，请勿混搭安装
3. 光影、高清材质会占用性能，低配可自行关闭
# English
## 📦 Pack Description
This pack **strictly retains the original survival gameplay** and **does not add any new items, tools, or original gameplay features.** It only includes **performance optimization, visual enhancement, and practical utility** mods to provide an authentic vanilla MC experience.
## 📂 Content Categories
- Optimization Mods: improve frame rate, reduce lag, optimize memory usage
- Visual Mods: shader support, texture optimization, visual enhancements
- Utility Mods: convenient operations, information display, survival aid
- Resource Packs / Shaders: can be freely turned on or off
## 📩 Contact Us
- Email communication: **qw_win11@outlook.com**
- Discord community: [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/xhJ3Q5zRk5)
- Github issue feedback section: [**Submit BUGs and suggestions**](https://github.com/qw-win11/Survival-Mode-Tweaks-issues)
## ⚠️ Notes
1. The pack does not break the original game balance; it is purely for auxiliary optimization
2. Not compatible with OptiFine; please do not install together
3. Shaders and high-definition textures consume performance; lower-end setups can turn them off
